title: State Street Global Advisors Announces Changes to US SPDR® Thematic ESG ETF
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--State Street Global Advisors, the asset management business of State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT), today announced several changes to its SPDR® MSCI ACWI Low Carbon Target ETF (LOWC). Effective on or about Friday, April 22, 2022, the SPDR MSCI ACWI Low Carbon Target ETF will undergo changes to its fund name, ticker, benchmark, listing exchange and will undergo a 4:1 stock split. title: State Street Announces Chief Financial Officer to Participate in RBC Capital Markets' Global Financial Institutions Conference
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT) announced today that its Chief Financial Officer, Eric Aboaf, will participate virtually in RBC Capital Markets' Global Financial Institutions Conference on Wednesday, March 9, 2022 at 11:20 am ET. An audio webcast and any presentation materials will be accessible on the home page of State Street's Investor Relations website, investors.statestreet.com. title: Fidelity, State Street Launch High Yield ETFs
text: SSgA expands its partnership with Blackstone, while Fidelity brings ESG to junk debt funds.

title: State Street Global Advisors Expands Fixed Income Offering with Debut of SPDR® Blackstone High Income ETF
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--State Street Global Advisors, the asset management business of State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT), today announced the launch of the SPDR® Blackstone High Income ETF (HYBL). Sub-advised by Blackstone Credit (“Blackstone”), HYBL is actively managed and invests in US dollar-denominated high yield debt securities seeking to provide investors with risk-adjusted returns and high current income. Blackstone is also sub-adviser of the SPDR® Blackstone Senior Loan ETF (SRLN). “

title: State Street strategist says markets have got carried away on interest rate-hike expectations
text: Des Lawrence, senior investment strategist at State Street Global Advisors, thinks the market may have gotten carried away with expectations for interest-rate hikes from central banks in both in the U.S. and the U.K. While fed fund futures suggests as many as seven rate hikes this year, Lawrence says the Federal Reserve may end up doing just two or three increases.

title: Charles River® Development Announces Collaboration with Precisely to Incorporate Enterprise Data Governance in State Street Alpha℠  Data Platform
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #Azure--The collaboration will enable Charles River to accelerate time to market for new and differentiated capabilities in the Street Alpha Data Platform.

title: Charles River and LedgerEdge Announce Collaboration to Provide DLT-Enabled Corporate Bond Liquidity and Trading Services
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #Azure--The collaboration will enable Charles River clients to access corporate bond liquidity from the LedgerEdge ecosystem.

title: State Street to Launch ETF That Invests in Line With Paris Agreement
text: State Street Global Advisors has applied to launch an ETF that targets investments that are aligned with requirements of the Paris Climate Accords. According to a filing with the SEC, the SPDR MSCI USA Climate Paris Aligned ETF intends to list and trade on the Nasdaq.

title: Charles River® Appoints Nidhi Singh as Chief Product Officer
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #Azure--As Chief Product Officer, Nidhi Singh will lead Charles River's product strategy, product marketing, and integration with State Street Alpha.
